title: proxy_start input
description: Input schema for the proxy_start tool.

name.description: Listener name for multi-listener support. Defaults to 'default' if omitted.

listen_addr.description: TCP address to listen on. Must be a loopback address. Defaults to 127.0.0.1:8080.

upstream_proxy.description: Upstream proxy URL to route all outgoing traffic through (e.g. http://host:port, socks5://host:port).

capture_scope.description: Controls which requests are recorded. If omitted, all requests are captured.

includes.description: Include rules. Only matching requests are captured.

excludes.description: Exclude rules. Takes precedence over includes.

tls_passthrough.description: Domain patterns that bypass TLS interception.

intercept_rules.description: Intercept rules for matching requests/responses. If omitted, no rules are active.

auto_transform.description: Auto-transform rules for automatic request/response modification at startup.

tcp_forwards.description: Maps local listen ports to upstream forwarding configurations. Values can be strings (legacy: host:port) or ForwardConfig objects ({target, protocol, tls}).

oneOf.description: ForwardConfig with target, protocol, and TLS options.

protocol.description: Expected protocol for L7 parsing. Default: auto.

tls.description: Enable TLS MITM termination on the forwarded port. Default: false.

protocols.description: Protocols to enable for detection. If omitted, all protocols are enabled.

tls_fingerprint.description: TLS ClientHello fingerprint profile for upstream connections.

socks5_auth.description: SOCKS5 authentication method. Defaults to none.

socks5_username.description: Username for SOCKS5 password authentication. Required when socks5_auth is password.

socks5_password.description: Password for SOCKS5 password authentication. Required when socks5_auth is password.

client_cert.description: Path to PEM-encoded client certificate for mTLS with upstream servers (global).

client_key.description: Path to PEM-encoded client private key for mTLS with upstream servers (global).

max_connections.description: Maximum number of concurrent proxy connections. Default: 128.

peek_timeout_ms.description: Protocol detection timeout in milliseconds. Default: 30000.

request_timeout_ms.description: HTTP request header read timeout in milliseconds. Default: 60000.

scope_rule.description: A scope rule. At least one field must be set.

hostname.description: Hostname pattern. Exact match or wildcard (e.g. *.example.com).

intercept_rule.description: An intercept rule with matching conditions.

direction.description: Applies to requests, responses, or both.

intercept_conditions.description: Matching conditions. All specified conditions are AND-ed.

host_pattern.description: Regex pattern for hostname matching (port excluded).

path_pattern.description: Regex pattern for URL path matching.

header_match.description: Header name to regex pattern mapping (AND logic).

upgrade_url_pattern.description: Regex for WebSocket upgrade URL matching (WebSocket rules only).

flow_id.description: WebSocket flow ID to intercept (WebSocket rules only).

transform_rule.description: An auto-transform rule with matching conditions and action.

direction.description: Applies to requests, responses, or both.
